title: ursinia glandulosa
intro: Ursinia glandulosa, also known as the Cape daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern region of South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ursinia glandulosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Ursinia glandulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used topically in the form of ointments and creams.
